channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Puzzle Bobble Everybubble! coming to PC on April 23
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Currently available for Switch.

Publisher Arc System Works and developer TAITO will release Puzzle Bobble Everybubble! for PC via Steam on April 23 for $39.99, the companies announced.

Puzzle Bobble Everybubble! first launched for Switch on May 23, 2023.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Play solo! Play with friends! The original bubble shooter is back!

The latest entry in the iconic action-puzzle series Puzzle Bobble, also known as Bust-A-Move, is finally on Steam! Join forces with Bub and his friends to clear the bubbles covering Rainbow Island and restore peace to the land.

Key Features

  • Co-Op Story Mode – For the first time in the series, team up with up to 4 players for local cooperative play!
  • More Content Than Ever – Experience a charming world with quirky characters and a substantial story—the most content-packed title in the series to date!
  • Global Rankings – Compete for high scores with players from around the world and climb the online leaderboards.
  • Two-Versus-Two Team Battles – A series first! Face off in intense 2vs2 team matches in local play.
  • Online Duels – Test your skills against players worldwide in 1-vs-1 online matches.
  • Play online matches with friends far away using the Password Matchmaking feature!
  • Includes the Space Invaders 45th Anniversary collaboration mini-game, Puzzle Bobble vs. Space Invaders!

Watch a new trailer below.

PC Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/puzzle-bobble-everybubble-coming-to-pc-on-april-23
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Spy Drops coming to PS5, Xbox Series on April 28
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Xbox Series

Currently available for Switch and PC.

Publisher Rainy Frog and developer Rainy Night Creations will release “modern retro stealth action” game Spy Drops for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series on April 28, the companies announced.

Spy Drops first launched for Switch and PC via Steam on July 31, 2025.

Here is an overview of the game, via Rainy Frog:

Experience retro 3D stealth action with modern effects, randomly generated missions, modern equipment, and local multiplayer!

As a member of the counter terrorist Spy Drops team, you are tasked with neutralizing a threat that could plunge the world into digital darkness, while you unknowingly get tangled in a deeper conspiracy.

Dropped behind enemy lines, your covert ops are to infiltrate infrastructure and undertake secret ops. While onsite you also need to make use of the Dream Catcher to extract intel from the minds of soldiers to discover the location of the next targets.

Missions are randomly generated producing a tense gameplay experience as you never know what is around the next corner. Everyone’s game will be different.

You’ll explore enemy bases room-by-room, choosing how to tackle each one, navigating past enemies who can see your shadow and hear your footsteps. You can dodge, hack or shot cameras, sneak past or knock out guards, scout the area with a drone, hide in lockers, or even wear sponge boots to move around quieter.

You’re free to choose which equipment you take on each mission, choosing from drones, hacking devices, explosives, night vision googles and many more. Varying times of day and weather conditions can be a hindrance or provide cover, so you’ll need to equip accordingly. New equipment and weapons are researched and added as the game progresses.

Take on a friend in local head-to-head multiplayer with Spy against Spy!

Jump into random missions outside the main story and push your skills to the limit. Your times in this mode will upload to the global leaderboards, where you can battle for the top spot against players all over the world.

Watch a new trailer below.

PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/spy-drops-coming-to-ps5-xbox-series-on-april-28
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Echoes of Aincrad: Sword Art Online – Galaxies Spring 2026 trailer
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Rise to the occasion.

Publisher Bandai Namco and developer Game Studio have released a new gameplay trailer for action RPG Echoes of Aincrad: Sword Art Online as part of today’s Galaxies Spring 2026 showcase.

Here are the latest details, via Bandai Namco:

Players will take part in intense real-time combat with meaningful progression within the deadly floors of the flying castle of Aincrad. As their adventure unfolds, each new level will grant them growth points to use and increase their attributes in classic RPG style, extending their stamina, strength, dexterity and more to fit their playstyle. Adding to their own capabilities, including a wide range of Special Skills, players will be able to choose between a variety of armor pieces and weapons. Visiting the smithy to enhance their armor will prove essential to get stronger and defeat bigger enemies.

In Echoes of Aincrad: Sword Art Online, survival will not be just about upgrading equipment. Progress will depend on mastering combat alongside a partner who will fight at players’ side and respond to commands. Battles will revolve around the Switch system, allowing players to seamlessly shift roles and chain attacks by alternating between autonomous partner actions or having the partner wait for player attacks and split damage. Each partner will feature a unique Special Skill, encouraging tactical decisions and precise execution.

Echoes of Aincrad: Sword Art Online is due out for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam on July 9 in Japan and July 10 worldwide.

Watch the trailer below.

Galaxies Spring 2026 Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/echoes-of-aincrad-sword-art-online-galaxies-spring-2026-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Yerba Buena demo now available for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Gameplay overview trailer released.

A demo for first-person puzzle platformer Yerba Bunea is now available for PC via Steam, publisher Focus Entertainment and developer Mad About Pandas announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Focus Entertainment:

About

The world is a game. Break the rules.

Step into a surreal puzzle platforming adventure as Barb, a young woman living as an NPC in an abandoned gameworld. When a sinister plot threatens your beloved San Francisco, you must step up to save it with the help of a mysterious and powerful device: the Oscillator.

Copy the movement and physical traits of the world around you, reapply them to manipulate the environment and solve inventive puzzles: give a table the bounce of a trampoline, send entire buildings across city blocks or turn solid walls into thin air!

Track down a dangerous biker gang and uncover the truth behind the glitch that threatens your world.

Key Features

  • Dive into a unique video game world set in 1970’s San Francisco and save your city with the help of your friends and some unlikely allies.
  • Master a ground-breaking “Copy and Paste” mechanic that lets you apply the movement and physical traits of objects to manipulate the gameworld.
  • Unlock new Oscillator features as you go, and combine them to solve mind-bending environmental puzzles!
  • Discover the origins of the mysterious glitch that threatens your city, and become the main character of your own story.

Yerba Buena is due out for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam on May 26.

Watch a new trailer below.

Gameplay Overview Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/yerba-buena-demo-now-available-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
